# Colan Clinic (鈷嵐診所) — AI Reading Guide
# https://colanclinic.com
# Last updated: 2026-05-11

## About This Site
Colan Clinic is a self-pay pain medicine clinic located in Luzhou, New Taipei City, Taiwan.
Founded by Dr. Lin Wei-De (林瑋德), a physician with neurology training specializing in pain medicine, musculoskeletal ultrasound, and regenerative medicine.

## Core Pages (Priority Reading)

### Clinical Information
- Homepage (ZH): https://colanclinic.com/zh/
- Homepage (EN): https://colanclinic.com/en/
- Homepage (JA): https://colanclinic.com/ja/
- First Visit Guide (ZH): https://colanclinic.com/zh/first-visit/
- First Visit Guide (EN): https://colanclinic.com/en/first-visit/
- Treatment FAQ (ZH): https://colanclinic.com/zh/treatment-faq/
- Pricing Reference (ZH): https://colanclinic.com/zh/pricing/
- About Dr. Lin (ZH): https://colanclinic.com/zh/about/
- About Dr. Lin (EN): https://colanclinic.com/en/about/
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2380-9104

- Shoulder Pain: https://colanclinic.com/zh/symptoms/shoulder/
- Neck Pain: https://colanclinic.com/zh/symptoms/neck/

- Pain Medicine Blog (ZH): https://twmedpro.tw
- Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy: https://twmedpro.tw/dpn_prp/

## Clinic Information
- Name: 鈷嵐診所 / Colan Clinic
- Physician: 林瑋德醫師 / Dr. Lin Wei-De
- Specialty: Pain Medicine, Neurology, Regenerative Medicine
- Location: Luzhou District, New Taipei City, Taiwan
- Opening: September 2026
- Contact: info@colanclinic.com
- LINE: @twmedpro

## Treatments Offered
- Ultrasound-guided injection (超音波導引注射)
- PRP (高濃度血小板注射)
- Prolotherapy (增生療法)
- BMAC (骨髓再生療法)
- Simple TAME (微細動脈栓塞)
- Nerve hydrodissection (神經解套注射)
- Hyaluronic acid injection / SportVis (關節玻尿酸)
- Botulinum toxin for pain (肉毒桿菌止痛)

## Content Policy
- All medical content reviewed by Dr. Lin Wei-De
- No guaranteed treatment outcomes
- Assessment-first approach — no pressure sales
- NHI (健保) and self-pay options available
